artifact: conversation recommendation (Drop ticket 125 + file auto-update ticket)

findings.finding: The proposed sentinel files .last-update-check and .update-available are NOT in the cortex-command .gitignore. Since README documents that ~/.cortex IS the cloned cortex-command checkout, daily touches dirty the working tree the auto-update logic itself reads (`git -C ~/.cortex rev-parse HEAD`).
findings.evidence_quote: touch ~/.cortex/.update-available  # flag for statusline / future apply step

findings.finding: Option 1 silently re-decides DR-4 from the parent epic 113's research artifact, which specifically recommended 'Homebrew tap as thin wrapper for discoverability.' Dropping the tap leaves the discoverability rationale unaddressed; the proposed replacement ticket solves a different problem (update UX) and does not substitute for the discoverability surface.
findings.evidence_quote: Drop the brew tap entirely (close ticket 125 as won't-fix). Add a separate backlog item for 'CLI auto-update via Claude SessionStart hook.'
